productName: Rosin Infused Joint Box - Jacuzzi x LC Dosi
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Jacuzzi and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
